description: Detailed restaurant visit post with dish ratings, pricing, and location tagging featuring food photography and numbered scoring system for each item ordered.
structural_recipe: Post high-quality food photography of restaurant dishes with: (1) Restaurant name and location/exit number, (2) Photographer credit tag, (3) Each dish listed with price in SAR and rating out of 10 (e.g., '32 (6 من 10)'), (4) Arabic captions emphasizing value assessment and taste experience. Structure as itemized menu review with comparative ratings.
why_it_works: Saudi audiences value detailed price-to-quality information and practical dining recommendations. The rating system with pricing creates social proof and helps followers make informed dining decisions. Location specificity (exit numbers, mall references) increases relevance and actionability. The scoring format is digestible, shareable, and builds credibility through transparency.
transplantation_caveats: Rating scale (x من 10) is culturally established in Saudi food content—maintain this format
Price transparency in SAR is expected; omitting prices reduces engagement
Location precision (exit numbers, nearby landmarks) is critical for Saudi audience navigation patterns
Credit attribution to photographer enhances trust and encourages photographer tagging behavior
